subject: [PATCH v4 10/11] mm: install PMD swap entries on swap-out

2026-07-13.patch_summary: This patch improves the handling of huge page mappings when swapping out memory. It introduces a new function to install PMD-level swap entries, which allows for more efficient swapping and reduces the overhead of rebuilding huge pages after a swap-out operation. The patch mirrors the existing PTE swap-out path at PMD granularity, ensuring that the swap entry value matches what 512 PTE swap entries would encode. This change is particularly relevant for zswap users, as it enables them to split PMD swap entries and fall back to the per-PTE path when necessary.
